subscriptionId.Description: Azure subscription ID where resources will be deployed

resourceGroupName.Description: Name of the Azure resource group (will be created if not exists)

automationAccountName.Description: Name of the Azure Automation Account

tags.Description: Resource tags to apply to all deployed Azure resources

hubSiteUrl.Description: Full URL to the Prosjektportalen hub site

serviceAccountEmail.Description: Email address for the SharePoint service account connection

createNewRegistration.Description: Whether to create a new Azure AD app registration

displayName.Description: Display name for the Azure AD application

language.Description: Language code for localization (e.g., nb-NO, en-US, sv-SE)

completionPhaseName.Description: Localized text for the project completion phase

archiveStatusName.Description: Localized text for the archived project status

defaultManagerRole.Description: Default SharePoint permission level for project managers

archiveBannerText.Value: Dette området er arkivert og skrivebeskyttet. Ta kontakt med administrator for å aktivere området igjen.
archiveBannerText.Description: Message displayed on archived project sites

dateCalculationRules.Description: Rules for calculating project milestone dates

folderStructure.Description: Standard folder structure for project document libraries

logLevel.Description: Logging level for the automation scripts (Debug, Info, Warning, Error)

deploymentSettings.Description: Selective deployment configuration - specify which components to deploy

sharePointSettings.Description: SharePoint-specific configuration (GUIDs can be found in SharePoint list settings)
